# iLQR

Iterative optimal control that linearizes dynamics and quadratizes cost around a nominal trajectory.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Control</span>
  <span>optimal control, nonlinear optimization, trajectory optimization</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize control sequence] --> B[Roll out nominal trajectory]
    B --> C[Linearize dynamics along trajectory]
    C --> D[Quadratize cost]
    D --> E[Backward pass for gains]
    E --> F[Forward line-search rollout]
    F --> G{Cost reduced?}
    G -- No --> H[Adjust regularization]
    H --> E
    G -- Yes --> I{Converged?}
    I -- No --> B
    I -- Yes --> J[Return optimized controls]
```


## Notes

- iLQR alternates a backward pass for feedback gains with a forward rollout.
- Regularization is often used when the local quadratic model is ill-conditioned.
